title: Sophisticated Storage in Motion (Unofficial Fabric port)
description: The Unofficial Fabric version of Sophisticated Storage In Motion
body:
This is the **Unofficial Fabric** version of **Sophisticated Storage In Motion**

For more information please check the official page of [Sophisticated Storage In Motion](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage-in-motion) by P3pp3rF1y.

This mod needs [Sophisticated Core (Unofficial Fabric Port)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-core-(unofficial-fabric-port)) and [Sophisticated Storage (Unofficial Fabric Port)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage-(unofficial-fabric-port)).

Looking for a backpack mod too? Checkout [Sophisticated Backpacks (Unofficial Fabric Port)!](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage-(unofficial-fabric-port))
